# Prism LLMs.txt

Prism is an authorization engine for AI agents with confidence-aware policy enforcement.

## Canonical URLs
- Docs: /docs
- Introduction: /docs
- Installation: /docs/installation
- Architecture: /docs/concepts/architecture
- API Reference: /docs/api/authorize
- CLI & MCP: /docs/concepts/cli
- Skills: /docs/concepts/skills

## Product Summary
- Rego-based authorization for human and AI actors.
- Confidence-aware decisioning and human-in-the-loop approvals.
- MCP tools for AI clients (Cursor, Claude Code, Open Code).
- Audit trail and token lifecycle controls.

## MCP Tools
- prism_agent_authorize
- prism_authorize
- prism_mint_token
- prism_revoke_token
- prism_health
